meta.policy: Only issues with verifiable evidence can be marked done.
meta.agentic_execution_policy: Sync is always allowed; automatic execution is blocked only when gate=blocked.

issues.title: Bootstrap issue governance
acceptance_criteria: GitHub apply sync works when credentials are available
Health check reports zero governance drift
Issue templates and labels are present
issues.problem_statement: Repository lacks a mandatory, executable, auditable, and self-synchronizing governance baseline for issue quality and GitHub Issue synchronization.
scope_in: Install issue templates and label definitions
Run audit, dry-run sync, apply sync, and health-check
scope_out: Perform full migration of historical issues
implementation_steps: Run apply synchronization when credentials are available
Run health-check and confirm zero governance drift
test_plan: Apply validates GitHub authentication before writing
Health-check fails when drift is detected
success_metrics: No duplicate GitHub Issues are created by repeated apply runs

issues.title: Enforce ledger-first issue governance in the starter kit
acceptance_criteria: Sync adopts existing GitHub Issues by github.number
Health-check reports unmanaged open issues as governance drift
Starter kit repository contains its own root issue ledger and governance files
Documentation tells developer agents to use ledger-first issue handling
issues.problem_statement: The starter kit distributed governance assets but did not govern its own repository from a root ledger. It also allowed manual GitHub Issues to remain outside the ledger until discovered by process review.
scope_in: Install the starter kit governance payload into the starter kit repository root
Add root docs/ISSUE_LEDGER.json as the starter kit source of truth
Harden sync to match existing issues by github.number
Report unmanaged open issues in health-check output
Document ledger-first issue behavior for agents and starter kit maintainers
scope_out: Adding product-specific issues to the starter kit ledger
Replacing GitHub branch protection or repository rulesets
implementation_steps: Run the installer against the starter kit repository root
Add root ledger entries for bootstrap and current governance hardening
Update sync to adopt issues by github.number
Update health-check to detect unmanaged open issues
Update documentation and installed workflow triggers
test_plan: Run starter kit installer against a smoke target
Run starter kit installer against the starter kit repository root
Run GitHub sync dry-run/apply and health-check for the starter kit repository
success_metrics: Starter kit repository has a real root issue ledger
GitHub Issues for starter kit governance are ledger-managed
Repeated dry-run after apply has no pending actions
risks: Issue-event workflow may need repository rules to become required
Existing manual issues must be backfilled or closed to keep drift at zero
